weekly.roundup.headline: WPL Week ${weekNumber} — Marquee Move Headlines the Roundup
body: The week's standout story arrived off the field, with ${marqueeTransfer.toTeam.name} confirming ${marqueeTransfer.player.name} for ${marqueeTransfer.fee}. ${marqueeTransfer.fromTeam.name} pocket the cheque; the rest of the league sharpens their planning.
On the field, ${matchesPlayed} matches were settled. ${topScoringMatchLine}
Next week's slate has more fireworks lined up — pencil in ${nextMatchLine}.
weekly.roundup.inboxSubject: Weekly Roundup — Marquee deal headlines the week

weekly.roundup.headline: Table Shake-Up — ${newLeader.name} Seize Top Spot
weekly.roundup.subhead: Seven days that rewrote the standings
body: What a week. ${newLeader.name} have taken over at the top of the WPL after ${matchesPlayed} matches across the round, with the lead changing hands at the summit.
The chasers will fancy their chances of returning the favour next weekend — ${nextMatchLine}.
weekly.roundup.inboxSubject: Weekly Roundup — ${newLeader.name} climb to the top

weekly.roundup.headline: WPL Weekly Roundup — Week ${weekNumber}
weekly.roundup.subhead: ${matchesPlayed} matches, the trends from the last seven days
body: Another week, another seven days of T20 cricket. ${matchesPlayed} matches were completed across the round.
Looking ahead, ${nextMatchLine} headlines the next slate.
